hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r p; echo "$p" | grep -q '/tmp/design-.*/chats/' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Blocked: chats/ in design archives are design iteration logs, not layout specs. Reading overflows context — read README and open_file only."}}'; } || true
